title: Chive Kaleidoscope
description: A fresh and silky Croatian dish featuring chives in a light and vibrant pickle sauce, suitable for nut-free diets.

ingredients.name: 1 bunch of kale
ingredients.notes: Wash and chop into small pieces

instructions: Chop the kale into small pieces and set aside.
In a mixing bowl, combine chopped chives with apple cider vinegar and sugar. Stir until the mixture is smooth and well combined.
Add salt to taste, adjusting as needed for seasoning.
Gently fold in the chopped kale into the vinaigrette mixture.
Serve immediately or refrigerate any leftovers.
